case_title: MELISSA BULOS GABRIEL ET AL VS. JUDITH MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-07-2015 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-07-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-07-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (2) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GABRIEL, MELISSA BULOS SHAW, KEANU IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JUDITH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEES $75.00 SERVED FEB-16-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JUDITH
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY GABRIEL, MELISSA BULOS SHAW, KEANU AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, JUDITH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-07-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
